examples.title: Pseudocode: Hello World Servlet
examples.description: A simple servlet that handles HTTP GET requests and returns a Hello World message
examples.code:
ALGORITHM HelloWorldServlet
INPUT: HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response
OUTPUT: Hello World message

BEGIN
 SET response content type to text/html
 GET PrintWriter to write response
 WRITE Hello World message to response
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic servlet that handles HTTP GET requests and returns a Hello World message

examples.description: A Java servlet that handles HTTP GET requests and returns a Hello World message
examples.explanation: This Java servlet demonstrates a basic servlet that handles HTTP GET requests and returns a Hello World message
